metadata.description: 6 publication-quality figures and 4 results tables from iteration-2 GEV experiments

data_quality_summary.Value: WARNING: 14 languages with feat_completeness < 0.3 may have artifactual morph_richness
CRITICAL: feat_completeness is a strong confound for morph_richness (rho > 0.7)
WARNING: >20% of bin-treebank combos show serial dependence
